name: Celestial Rose Gold Ring
description: A masterpiece of understated luxury — our Celestial Rose Gold Ring features a hand-set pink sapphire encircled by delicate pavé diamonds in 18k rose gold. The band is gently tapered, designed to sit flush on the finger and shine from every angle.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Timeless elegance suspended from your ears. Baroque freshwater pearls in lustrous ivory are wire-wrapped in 22k gold and finished with a hand-polished teardrop. These earrings move gracefully with you, catching light with every gesture.

name: Eternal Blossom Bangle
description: A continuous garden of rubies and diamonds wrapped around your wrist. Our Eternal Blossom Bangle is cast in solid 18k gold and set with 48 round brilliant diamonds and 12 natural rubies, each placed by hand in a floral motif.

name: Dewdrop Pendant Set
description: A single dewdrop of pink tourmaline suspended on a whisper-thin 18k rose gold chain, paired with matching stud earrings. This pendant set is designed to rest gracefully at the collarbone, adding a flush of warmth to any neckline.

name: Heritage Gold Kada
description: Rooted in centuries of Indian goldsmithing tradition, our Heritage Gold Kada is cast in solid 22k gold and intricately hand-engraved with floral motifs inspired by Rajasthani artistry. A statement piece that bridges the ancient and the modern.

name: Layered Diamond Necklace
description: Three delicate chains in graduated lengths, each set with hand-selected round brilliant diamonds. This layered necklace creates instant depth and dimension, elevating both casual and formal looks with effortless sophistication.

name: Bridal Choker Set
description: The centrepiece of a SAMVI bridal trousseau. This statement choker features 120 hand-set polki diamonds and natural rubies in an intricate floral latticework of 22k gold. Includes matching jhumka earrings and a maang tikka — a complete bridal ensemble.

name: Dainty Infinity Chain
description: Our most-loved everyday chain — a barely-there 18k gold infinity chain that disappears against the skin, adding the finest golden glow to any outfit. The infinity clasp is hand-finished and rated for lifetime wear.

name: Anniversary Gift Hamper
description: Everything she deserves in one stunning box. Our Anniversary Hamper includes a gold chain, a pair of diamond studs, a rose gold bangle, and a handwritten greeting card — all nestled in our signature ivory gift box tied with a silk ribbon.

name: Sunburst Stud Earrings
description: A miniature burst of sunlight for your ears. These geometric gold studs feature a hand-hammered sunburst pattern in 18k gold, finished with a high-polish edge. Lightweight, secure, and beautiful — perfect for daily wear or gifting.

name: Festive Lakshmi Gold Set
description: Celebrate every festival in timeless gold. This temple-style set includes a Lakshmi pendant necklace, matching jhumka earrings, and a broad gold bangle — each piece hand-crafted by traditional artisans and finished with temple-grade polish.

name: Stackable Garden Rings
description: A set of three stackable bands — one plain polished, one twisted rope, and one pavé diamond — designed to be worn in any combination. Mix them across fingers or layer them all on one for a botanical garden effect. Each ring sold individually or as a set.

name: Royal Emerald Necklace
description: A statement necklace worthy of royalty. Forty-two hand-matched Colombian emeralds are bezel-set in 18k yellow gold, graduating from a single deep-green centre stone. The design is inspired by Mughal court jewellery, reinterpreted for the modern woman.

name: Luxury Gift Set — Her
description: The ultimate luxury gift for the woman who has everything — and deserves more. Includes a pearl drop necklace, sunburst gold studs, a dainty infinity chain, and our signature SAMVI velvet jewellery pouch, all packaged in our embossed gift box.

name: Tennis Diamond Bracelet
description: The jewellery world's most coveted classic — our Diamond Tennis Bracelet features 68 perfectly matched round brilliant diamonds in a seamless 18k white gold setting. Each stone is individually secured with four prongs for maximum security and brilliance.
